symptom_vector: Node memory exhaustion, memory saturation, high memory usage, memory leak, memory stress

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [aiops-k8s-06] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [node_memory_usage_rate] in Metric data (From GT key_observations keyword list)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes] in Metric data (From GT key_observations keyword list)
Step 4: Derive Root Cause - Based on memory metric anomalies, determined cause is [node_memory_usage_rate] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Metric value shows abnormal increase from normal baseline
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric [node_memory_usage_rate] for node [aiops-k8s-06] and compare normal vs fault period values
Check metric [node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes] for node [aiops-k8s-06] to confirm memory pressure
